untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) unusual order flow, (2) liquidity withdrawal, (3) correlation shift, (4) skew change, and (5) pattern recognition confidence scoring (0.40 threshold). These microstructure and machine-learning derived metrics are not available in the allowed indicator set. Approximated with volatility bandwidth and historical volatility percentile proxy, but core pattern recognition logic cannot be translated.
translation_notes: Used hvol_20 as proxy for volatility percentile trigger (>50th percentile approximated as elevated hvol_20). Used bb_bandwidth to approximate spread widening. Entry is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal but cannot properly encode the pattern_confidence_threshold (0.5) or distinguish long vs short positioning without the missing order flow and correlation indicators. Exit condition of 'realized volatility exceeds implied by 10%' approximated with hvol_20 > 0.10 (10% decimal). Position sizing parameter (10% of capital) noted but not encoded in JSON schema.
